_comment: Shipped preset for SAM3 open-vocabulary text segmentation. main_prompt → CLIPTextEncode (the SAM3 checkpoint's own language backbone) → SAM3_Detect conditioning; every detected instance of the concept becomes its own mask (individual_masks=true). Kept as a SEPARATE workflow from sam3-prompt: an always-bound CLIPTextEncode with empty text would push garbage detections into the point/box path.
label: SAM3 Text Concept
description: Segment every instance of a text concept with SAM3.1 (e.g. 'strap' → one image per strap). Upstream image → LoadImage; stage prompt → CLIPTextEncode. Outputs one transparent-bg PNG per instance (COMFYTV_IMAGES). Needs sam3.1_multiplex_fp16.safetensors in models/checkpoints.

image.error: Split Parts needs an upstream image — wire one into the stage's image input.

text.error: The text workflow needs a concept prompt — type what to segment (e.g. 'strap').
